alt_text: A small purple-on-white numerology display showing the digit sequence '1 2 4 0 0 0' on the top line and the equation '(1 + 2 + 4 + 0 + 0 + 0 = 7)' on the bottom line.
notes: Numerological / place-value teaching aid. The digits 1, 2, 4 (powers-of-two-style) plus padding zeros sum to 7 — likely referencing a seven-rank structure in the chapter on ranks.
